title: Adding Taxonomy to CSV Workflow
description: Interactive Mermaid visualization for adding taxonomy to csv workflow
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
mermaid
learningObjectives: Sequence the six steps for adding taxonomy categorization to a learning graph CSV, from identifying natural categories to validating the distribution
Design 3-5 letter taxonomy abbreviations such as FOUND, BASIC, and ARCH that group concept labels by topic, domain, or complexity
Distinguish when to use the automated add-taxonomy.py keyword-matching script versus manual category assignment based on graph size and domain specialization
Evaluate a taxonomy distribution for balance using the rule that no single category should exceed 30 percent of total concepts
